name: get_task_status
description: Check whether an async task is done yet — an image, video, or music generation, a use_computer computer-use run, or a CLI coding-agent task. Answers "is it finished/ready yet", reports progress and whether it is still running, and returns the result URL once complete. This is a one-shot check — call it once when you (or the user) want a status update; you do not need to poll it in a loop, since the live task pill refreshes progress on its own. Takes the task ID the generating tool returned.
returns: Returns status, progress, and result URL when complete
notes: One-shot status check. The live task pill refreshes progress on its own, so there is no need to poll this in a loop.
